overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing the Gryffindor common room interior. The scene features a large stone fireplace with a roaring fire, Gothic stone architecture, tapestries, and a character sitting on the floor in the foreground while warm firelight illuminates the cozy medieval space.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with central fireplace

agents.ego_description: sitting on the floor near the fireplace, facing the warmth with legs stretched out

notable_agents.action: walking through the stone archway doorway in the background, moving from left to right

entered.detail: Gothic stone fireplace with carved columns and a burning fire inside
dark wooden mantelpiece above the fireplace with decorative beams
red and gold wall hanging tapestry depicting a lion or crest
oval-framed portrait of a bearded man in historical dress
large framed landscape painting in a gold frame hanging on the stone wall
upholstered armchair with high back near the tapestry
large patterned rug covering the stone floor in front of the fireplace
green climbing plant in a pot against the right wall
Gothic stone archway leading to another room or corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary in a cozy Gothic common room centered on a large stone fireplace with a roaring fire. A character sits on the floor in the foreground enjoying the warmth, while the room features medieval tapestries, oil paintings, and wooden furniture. Briefly, an NPC walks through the distant stone archway in the background, adding a touch of life to the otherwise tranquil scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze within a cozy Gothic common room, capturing a moment of tranquil warmth centered around a roaring fireplace. It begins with a focus on a character sitting on the floor in the foreground, bathed in the flickering orange glow of the hearth. As the eye wanders across the space, the scene reveals the rich textures of medieval tapestries, oil paintings, and heavy wooden furniture that define the room's architecture. The stillness then shifts slightly as an NPC walks through a distant stone archway in the background, adding a subtle layer of life to the quiet atmosphere before the shot settles back into its peaceful state.
